content.description: Яркий маникюр на коротких ногтях, выполненный мастером в черной перчатке.
content.alt_text: Яркий розовый маникюр на коротких ногтях

hero.reason: Striking close-up of a finished manicure that immediately showcases the salon's skill.

about.reason: This image focuses on the result, not the salon's interior or atmosphere.

gallery.reason: Excellent close-up showcasing a high-quality manicure result, perfect for a gallery.

team.reason: No clear view of a master's face or context to identify them as staff.
